plugins.name: eneo-core
plugins.description: Eneo slash commands (/gsd-*, /eneo-env-check), subagents, and skills (PRD/plan/issues, FastAPI, SvelteKit, audit-log, frontend-design)

plugins.name: eneo-standards
plugins.description: Hook-enforced standards: TDD phase gate, bash firewall, wave barrier, ratchets, validators, pyright typecheck

plugins.name: eneo-review
plugins.description: Optional adversarial review (Codex + Gemini) — trigger-gated for Deep lane + risky paths only

plugins.name: eneo-findings
plugins.description: GitHub Projects findings tracker + /finding-teach session learning extractor

plugins.name: karpathy-guidelines
plugins.description: [LEGACY — to be removed in Phase 8] Behavioral guidelines; principles now live in eneo-context.md paired with enforcement hooks

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: [LEGACY — merged into eneo-core in Phase 8] Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces

plugins.name: checker
plugins.description: [LEGACY — absorbed into eneo-standards in Phase 8] Automated Pyright type checking for eneo Python backend

plugins.name: vikunja-kanban
plugins.description: [LEGACY — to be removed in Phase 8] Vikunja Kanban card management; replaced by GitHub Projects

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: [LEGACY — absorbed into eneo-review in Phase 8] Multi-persona peer review via OpenAI Codex CLI

plugins.name: gemini-review
plugins.description: [LEGACY — absorbed into eneo-review in Phase 8] Architectural cross-verification via Google Gemini CLI

plugins.name: finding
plugins.description: [LEGACY — absorbed into eneo-findings in Phase 8] Create, list, and grab GitHub issues from the eneo project board
